svg.title: <size:18>EC2 Instance Discount System - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)</size>

g.text: EC2 Instance Discount System - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "Customer launches t3.large in us-east-1. System picks best discount: Reserved 3yr > Savings Plan > Spot > On-Demand."
"An EC2Instance has a type (t3, m5, c5),
and OS. Each combination has a
"Before any discount, what's the list price?
to an hourly rate. Example: t3.large /
All discounts are applied ON TOP of this."
and adds another layer on top."
by isEligible(), computes price for each,
if price exceeds customer's max bid.
base rate ($0.0832/hr), DiscountEngine finds all eligible strategies,
picks cheapest: Reserved 3yr All-Upfront (60% off). LoyaltyDecorator
adds 5% more. Spot prices fluctuate and Observer notifies.
Add any new discount = one new class. System untouched."
Customer: account type, reservations, savings plans
6 discount strategies: OnDemand, Reserved, Spot, SavingsPlan, Volume, Enterprise
Stack discounts: Loyalty + PromoCode wrap base strategy
Spot prices fluctuate, observers react (interrupt, alert)
PriceBreakdown: base, discount, final, monthly estimate
